caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 24 kt winds with 6.8 ft wave heights and a 25% rain probability, while Barbados has 15 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from ENE, affecting port operations in the Western Caribbean and Lesser Antilles.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storms Bring Rain
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing 75% rain probability with waves reaching 3.3 ft, while Haifa has winds of 13 kt. The Western Mediterranean, including Lisbon, has less than 10% rain probability in surrounding areas, but the immediate port area is under a higher rain threat.
